# Onboarding: start session and verify it creates items

# Setup
exec git init
exec git config user.email test@test.com
exec git config user.name Test
exec $GOT_BIN init

# Create some decisions first
exec $GOT_BIN decision create --title FirstDecision --context ctx1 --decision dec1 --no-interactive
exec $GOT_BIN decision create --title SecondDecision --context ctx2 --decision dec2 --no-interactive

# Start onboarding - should seed with existing decisions
exec $GOT_BIN onboard start
stdout 'Onboarding session'
stdout 'active'
